channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Former BIS chief softens stance on stablecoins, backs coexistence with fiat
item.description: Former BIS general manager Agustín Carstens said stablecoins can enhance financial inclusion and innovation but stressed the need for global regulatory frameworks to enable coexistence with fiat money.

item.title: Bitcoin volatility looks cheap as $10 billion options settlement nears
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 23, 2026

item.title: Crypto market drops as Nasdaq tech selloff spills into digital assets
item.description: Bitcoin lost 2.5% to $62,300 and ether fell more than 4% while $717 million in liquidations amplified losses across altcoins.

item.title: Binance’s Yi He warns of alleged impersonation scam, CoinUp denies ties
item.description: Binance co-founder Yi He warns of an alleged impersonator referred to as “Zhu Pan” in Chinese-language posts as CoinUp distances itself from the individual.

item.title: US Senate Passes Housing Bill With Four-Year Fed CBDC Ban
item.description: A bipartisan housing bill the Senate passed 85-5 Monday would block a Fed digital dollar through 2030, and now heads to the House.

item.title: Bitcoin gets new $54K warning as BTC price hits 11-day low on Asia tech sell-off
item.description: Bitcoin analysis warned of "new lows" as Asia markets dropped as much as 10% and BTC price action dipped below $62,000 for the first time in nearly two weeks.

item.title: Ripple targets EU, wins preliminary MiCA approval from Luxembourg financial regulator
item.description: The license will enable Ripple to offer its stablecoin payment systems to European companies and expand into broader crypto functions.

item.title: THORChain resumes trading more than month after $10M exploit
item.description: THORChain resumed all network activity after implementing multiple security upgrades and a vault migration to fix the vulnerabilities that led to the $10.7 million exploit.

item.title: Hut 8 to pay $2.35 million to settle investor suit over U.S. Bitcoin merger
item.description: The former bitcoin miner denied any wrongdoing related to its 2023 merger with U.S. Bitcoin Corp.

item.title: Ripple gains preliminary MiCA license ahead of July 1 EU deadline
item.description: Ripple secures preliminary CASP approval in Luxembourg ahead of July 1 MiCA deadline as companies race for EU crypto licensing.

item.title: Bitcoin price has limited downside, likely near bottom, contrarian indicator suggests
item.description: The bitcoin price's long-term moving averages are set to flash a bearish signal soon. That's good news for the bulls.

item.title: More licensing momentum! Ripple has secured its preliminary Crypto Asset Service Provider (CASP) license in Luxembourg, paving the way for the full rollout of Ripple Payments across the EEA and full MiCA compliance: on.ripple.com/4en8dLc The next wav - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFByTm4zOUlzQXY1dXUzeXo0MHZGUXp3a2Y3eWdLLW5BdkV5WGxWNkE4RWxLMW1YaVhlbjZ1SWxHZzN6SS10emJLbnAtMjBaQUhGaGFCUk9xR2dMRW8?oc=5" target="_blank">More licensing momentum! Ripple has secured…

item.title: Live updates: Bitcoin drops to $62,000 as South Korea's Kospi crashes 10%
item.description: The fast decline in prices set off $700 million in forced liquidations across the market.

item.title: XRP drifts toward $1.10 support as traders await break from three-week range
item.description: Weak volume and fading momentum kept XRP pinned near the bottom of its recent range, with the $1.05-$1.10 area emerging as the market's key line in the sand.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $63,000 Over $150,000,000 longs liquidated from the crypto market in the past 15 minutes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBHUkJRUUZTb0k1eUtDMk10MmQzR3lBXzNRVE9LaHoyREx1UUdsdzd6N0ExbFFmeXJ0ajFYN0JwUWtqQnlLb1VabTNoUUdJdTVIQWJyTW9GMGVBNEd2a2RCcDZR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $63,0…

item.title: SpaceX’s $600 billion plunge erased equivalent of nearly half of bitcoin’s market cap in 3 days
item.description: The newly public company shed close to half of bitcoin's entire market value in three sessions after announcing its first bond sale. Bitcoin, absorbing the same backdrop, fell less than 1%.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: US Senate passes housing bill with CBDC ban until 2030
item.description: The Senate voted 85-5 to pass a major housing affordability bill that includes a ban on the Federal Reserve making a central bank digital currency until 2030.

item.title: Bitcoin falls under $63,000 as a tech selloff drags risk assets lower
item.description: A rotation out of this year's best AI and chip stocks sank Asian markets, with South Korea's Kospi down 6%, and crypto fell with them. Bitcoin is down more than 3% on the week.

item.title: Trump signs orders to build a quantum computer and protect against the one that could break encryption
item.description: The White House issued twin executive orders to accelerate U.S. development of large-scale quantum computers while simultaneously hardening defenses against such machines.

item.title: Crypto lobby urges Congress to pass staking and mining tax bill as is
item.description: A trio of crypto lobby groups says a bill allowing staking and mining rewards to be taxed when they’re sold should be passed without further amendments.

item.title: Trump signs orders for quantum computer, cryptography upgrades
item.description: “We’re going to be investing in American quantum leadership like never before to stay ahead of the pack,” says US President Donald Trump.

item.title: Bitmine, Sharplink and Joe Lubin back Ethereum R&D nonprofit
item.description: Sharplink says the new nonprofit, Ethlabs, “exists to ensure the network is ready to absorb” the demand that institutions will place on it with stablecoins, tokenization and AI.

item.title: OFAC Sanctions ISIS Operators for Financing Terror Group with Crypto
item.description: Summary OFAC designated three individuals and six entities across Europe, the Middle East, and West Africa for facilitating financial transactions… The post OFAC Sanctions ISIS Operators for Financing Terror Group with Crypto appeared firs…

item.title: U.S. Senate passes housing bill that carries four-year ban on a Fed CBDC
item.description: The idea of a U.S. central bank digital currency — though little more than a research topic at the Federal Reserve — may be getting formally blocked.

item.title: Bitcoin funding rate hits 2-week high: Is $70K next?
item.description: Bitcoin’s funding rate and orderbook setup signal investor optimism, but ETF outflows and macro red flags could limit BTC’s short-term upside.

item.title: Securitize and tZERO clash over patents as race to bring Wall Street onchain heats up
item.description: tZERO and Securitize are squaring off over tokenization patents as the market attracts more of Wall Street's attention.

item.title: Ric Edelman says crypto’s biggest growth story is happening off the price chart
item.description: Crypto prices remain under pressure, but Ric Edelman says institutional adoption and tokenization are accelerating behind the scenes.

item.title: 21Shares co-founder warns tokenization hype is outrunning Wall Street reality
item.description: Tokenization can improve settlement and asset movement, but key pieces of financial infrastructure remain unprepared for institutional-scale adoption.

item.title: Comparing Bitcoin Giant Strategy to Terra Luna Is a STRC, Benchmark Says
item.description: The analysts underscored that Strategy's Stretch (STRC) can't technically lose its “peg.”

item.title: Franklin Templeton launches dedicated crypto division after closing 250 Digital acquisition
item.description: The new unit arrives amid rapid growth in tokenized assets, with Franklin Templeton's onchain product suite expanding from roughly $768 million to more than $2.5 billion over the past year.

item.title: Strive says digital credit selloff was a liquidation event, not a credit crisis
item.description: A sharp selloff in digital credit products exposed growing pains in a young market, a Strive executive argues the underlying credit fundamentals remain intact.

item.title: BitMine, Sharplink, Joe Lubin Back New Ethereum Research and Development Lab
item.description: Some of Ethereum's largest holders are coming together to fund a new research and development lab aimed at boosting the network and ETH.

item.title: Trump Orders Acceleration of Quantum Readiness as Bitcoin Faces Coming Risk
item.description: President Donald Trump signed two executive orders aimed at expanding U.S. quantum computing capabilities and speeding the transition to quantum-resistant encryption.

item.title: New York, Maryland and Utah to hold primaries with crypto PAC money hanging over voters
item.description: Crypto-backed PACs disclosed spending more than $8 million on media to support candidates in three US states, as some Maryland Democrats have called on one candidate to reject “outside spending from crypto billionaires.”

item.title: Google Warns AI Consciousness Debate Could Become a Political Battleground
item.description: A new paper from Google DeepMind argues that disagreements over whether AI is conscious could spill into politics, law, and public institutions.

item.title: NEW: Bitcoin Long-Term Holder supply hits an all-time high of 16.64M BTC, 83% of the total circulating supply 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFAtWVVFN2dCRjEzN01EVkxYaFlFS09nTWpMRm1TYXBpS1BBODZ6SXlNSENuY1BGQm01SkNwY1JfbXlhN0hrZ2ZzbFVVWjFsTndRd2JpdUh5MUtoZ0FPc1FEOWNNLUQxZw?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: Bitcoin Long-Term Holde…

item.title: Ether’s biggest corporate holders back new Ethereum research hub
item.description: Ethlabs was formed with support from SharpLink, Bitmine and Consensys CEO Joe Lubin as the network's development is expanding beyond the Ethereum Foundation.

item.title: Solana grabs 95% of tokenized equity as traders debate if SOL bottom is in
item.description: Solana captured 95% of tokenized equity volumes as analysts debate whether $60 was the bottom for SOL.

item.title: Crypto Industry Urges Congress to Pass Tax Bill—But Will It Happen This Year?
item.description: A bill that would make crypto mining and staking more attractive is a top priority for industry leaders—and a growing concern for House Democrats.

item.title: Five former Ethereum Foundation researchers just launched @ethlabs_org, an independent non-profit R&D lab for Ethereum. Behind the new org: Ansgar Dietrichs, Barnabé Monnot, Caspar Schwarz-Schilling, Josh Rudolf, and Julian Ma Backers: @BitMNR, - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE01R1E2ZmtVeVVVTUMzYTY5NHNyZkhUcXpTNVl1N1psd2lNTnZtZVRIeUxTYjZJQktudWRyTUcyNWdvbEJSQS1tMUtuaDNOT0k5X1NpVjVFOU51cTJMN18wc1p3?oc=5" target="_blank">Five former Ethereum Foundation re…

item.title: Ethereum MEV Bot JaredFromSubway Threatens Legal Action After $7.5 Million Loss
item.description: The well-known trading bot took a hit this weekend after it fell victim to a series of transactions that left its logic exposed.

item.title: ICE and OKX Are Teaming Up to Bring Tokenized Securities to Wall Street
item.description: The pair will focus on advancing tokenization and digital asset infrastructure in a joint venture co-chaired by the former governor of New York.

item.title: Extremely excited to announce our support of @ethlabs_org alongside @fundstrat ( @BitMNR), @ethereumjoseph, and other Ethereum stakeholders. Founded by former senior Ethereum Foundation researchers, this independent nonprofit will ready Ethereum - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE16TDFqeEdfNG4tNzc1ZTBmQk1CaUloT3QyU3BqMGZ0QkRUMXdfTThDLVRtLURPeDlncWdUc2JjTF9ETW9waEhDazRuYkk1RDRpd1VQYWdfMGg4aURfbl9F?oc=5" target="_blank">Extremely excited to announce our supp…

item.title: The Studio Behind 'Ex Machina' Is Now Researching AI With Google
item.description: Google is investing $75 million in A24 as part of a new AI research initiative focused on filmmaking tools.

item.title: I'm joining Ethlabs @ethlabs_org, a new R&D lab to grow Ethereum and ETH. The network and the asset are entering a new age of adoption, and this is a shift we cannot miss. More capital is coming onchain, both institutional and retail, through the portals of D - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1UeEFHcHg5aHA4N0FxamRkaGRyNEpfSFdabW96M0hOLWhfQjh0MmNybjJtVWZMUXlGbExHTDRDM3JCNDQ5elVYbC1sMHRkc3o1OU5uRDRlZFdRMzlkX0Riak5Tc0Y?oc=5" target="_blank">I'm joining Ethlabs @ethlabs_or…

item.title: New Ethereum org just dropped. While the EF is shrinking its mandate and more focused on protecting Ethereum's core properties, a group of EF builders have spun out to create a second org. Its mandate is simple: accelerate Ethereum. Increase adoption. Pr - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE5PUWljSWktaEczNUFfcmdydTVwTjdhY0xzQk80VGFRbGhCSG5Nb1g5UXRoTlREVDFSZkNJT0N2UUJScmZvZDN0ODZyVnRMQXZYc2NyVXFvQTg5cEhW?oc=5" target="_blank">New Ethereum org just dropped. While the E…

item.title: Andrew Cuomo to lead joint TradFi-crypto venture between OKX and Intercontinental Exchange
item.description: The venture is subject to regulatory approvals but will be co-chaired by ICE and former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, who began working with OKX in 2023.

item.title: Bitcoin weekly close above $63K amid RSI divergence may be bottom signal: Data
item.description: Bitcoin's repeated weekly candle close above $63,000 align with signals that may mark a market bottom.

item.title: Bank of England Eases Stablecoin Rules, Swaps Holding Caps for £40B ‘Guardrail’
item.description: The BoE scrapped individual holding caps for a £40 billion per-coin issuance limit and will let issuers hold more reserves in government debt.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation talent exodus sparks fresh debate over leadership
item.description: The Ethereum community is once again debating the future of the foundation after co-executive director Hsiao-Wei Wang announced she would step down.

item.title: Crypto's second U.S. lobbying front — tax policy — sees industry push on mining, staking
item.description: The crypto sector's leading U.S. advocacy groups asked the U.S. House's tax committee to advance a bill to clarify treatment of assets from mining and staking.

item.title: Bitcoin price taps $65.5K as Iran deal sees oil drop toward 16-week low
item.description: Bitcoin sought a breakout toward a potential BTC price target near $70,000 as Iran news sent oil toward its lowest levels since early March.

item.title: There have recently been claims that AI text analysis will make online anonymity untenable. So let me cannibalize a piece of my own anonymity to do an experiment. At some point this decade, I wrote a published document of medium importance to Ethereum - - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9UNUVFbWRtaFdaUUJ6OWtWenNWZTZYbGd4M1I2VDJyeDA0LXZEZDREamZtOVBweW1VUW1uVWk3TEpyTmx2NzNrTHd4eXNxWElkcGkzdzdWb2dWZk45TmpZWU5lX3ozQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">There have recently been cla…

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin is performing the strongest it ever has during a bear market in its history 👀 Bullish! 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5SQTdTeS1RRmFDa2NmSjFPc0ExemtINl8wUUJnNmVpOWw5dWNJWGJLdndUTWhBUXZOY0s4R2pxOG13LVExMnhyM184QXNfbEdpWkxjYTBsbUctS1dvN3ZPSm9fSWNtdkU?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin is perform…

item.title: Ethereum Layer-2 Taiko Warns Users to Withdraw Bridge Funds After Security Breach
item.description: Researchers estimate more than $1.7 million was stolen after attackers allegedly exploited Taiko's proof verification process.

item.title: Tom Lee’s BitMine Adds $92 Million in Ethereum, Hits 4.7% of Total Supply
item.description: The leading Ethereum treasury firm inched closer to its goal of accumulating 5% of the ETH circulating supply.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin at $65,000 as Iran Deal Wobbles
item.description: Macro uncertainty, STRC finding a new low and another $227M in ETF outflows weren't enough to keep Bitcoin down over the past week.

item.title: Anchorage aims to bring banks onchain with new tokenized deposit platform
item.description: The crypto bank aims to help financial institutions offer round-the-clock payments and settlement without replacing their core systems.

item.title: Strategy Pads Cash Reserves to $1.4B After STRC's Stumble
item.description: Michael Saylor’s firm topped up its USD cash reserve to $1.4 billion as it made its smallest Bitcoin buy since selling 32 BTC three weeks ago
